subcodes.first_line: O thou spiritual friend and prince of the luminous realm! Praise be to God that Mount Paran is in a state of tumult, and this is due to the heat of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خلیل الله رحمانی و امیر اقلیم نورانی الحمد لله که فاران در فورانست و این از حرارت محبت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love and unity, @praise and encouragement
